description:
Modernize and improve the nvf-based Neovim configuration based on a comprehensive plugin review. Focus areas: completion engine, formatting, navigation, and in-editor UX.

## Sequencing

```mermaid
graph LR
    1[blink.cmp] --> 9[consolidate md preview]
    2[ruff python] 
    3[conform.nvim]
    4[fzf-lua or telescope-fzf-native]
    5[render-markdown.nvim] --> 9
    6[treesitter-textobjects]
    7[inc-rename]
    8[oil.nvim]
    10[nvim-spider]
    11[yanky.nvim]
    12[mini.indentscope]
    13[trouble v3 symbols]
```

Most tasks are independent and can be done in any order, except consolidating markdown preview plugins (9) which depends on render-markdown.nvim (5) and potentially blink.cmp (1) being settled first.
title: Neovim plugin improvements
